name: Knightess
short_description: Anastasia, Artemisia & Lozen, three mercenaries who roam the Kingdom' looking for work, are seen by the King as the possible solution to keep the peace, even if only temporally. Join the three of them, as they journey in what will become a path of discovery, friendship and betrayal.
detailed_description:
PRESENTATION


This is a 2D RPG in the style of Skyfall and Thorne.

The Kingdom is in the brink of Civil War. In one side the Barons want to keep the slavery, which is the basis of their economy. In the other side the Merchants want to put an end to it, as they believe trading is the future of economy. In the middle of all of that is King Aethelred, struggling to keep the Kingdom together while finding a solution.

Anastasia, Artemisia and Lozen, three mercenaries who roam the Kingdom's roads looking for work and people to help, are seen by the King as the possible solution to keep the peace, even if only temporally.
Join the three of them, as they journey in what will become a path of discovery, friendship and betrayal.

FEATURES


  • Powerful storytelling that will keep you engaged from start to finish
  • Beautiful graphics and many different locations to explore. The Kingdom feels alive!
  • Sidequests to complete
  • Secret rooms to discover
  • Quest Journal to keep track of your progress
  • Mouse support
  • 20 hours of gameplay
